title: New Hire IT Setup
text:
## New Hire IT Setup

**Employee:** {person}

**Start date:** {adjective}day

**Hardware issued:**
- {adjective} laptop with {adjective} monitor
- {adjective} keyboard and wireless {object}

**Accounts created:**
- Email and {adjective} access
- Badge: {adjective} wing, {number} floor

**Training scheduled:**
- {adjective} security awareness
- How to {verb} without breaking the {object}

**Notes:** No admin rights on the {object}. Manager says they are {adjective} and should never receive {adjective} permissions.
